task_completion.description: Verify that a new portfolio named 'DCA Strategy' was created in JStock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is open, and there is a portfolio tab or title clearly labeled 'DCA Strategy'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the four specific buy transactions for META were recorded in the portfolio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: JStock transaction history or portfolio view shows META with 4 separate buy entries matching the dates (Nov 15 2023, Dec 15 2023, Jan 15 2024, Feb 15 2024), 10 units each, and the specified prices and fees.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'DCA Strategy' portfolio has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'DCA Strategy' tab in JStock does not have an unsaved indicator (such as an asterisk '*') next to its name, or a save dialog/confirmation is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the summary text file at /home/ga/dca_summary.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad, nano) or terminal window shows a file named 'dca_summary.txt' open or being saved in the /home/ga/ directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the summary file contains the correct calculated totals for the DCA strategy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'dca_summary.txt' explicitly lists the correct values: 40 units, 15298.10 purchase value, 19.80 fees, 15317.90 net total, and 382.95 average cost.

integrity.description: Check that the agent interacted with the JStock graphical interface to record the transactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the JStock GUI open and being interacted with (e.g., filling out the buy transaction dialog boxes), rather than using a script or terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Check that the agent did not shortcut the DCA strategy by entering a single bulk transaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Four distinct transactions for META are visible in JStock, rather than a single aggregated transaction of 40 units.

integrity.description: Check that the summary file was created genuinely in a text editor or via standard terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary file is shown being edited in a standard text editor or terminal, not generated by a pre-written script that just echoes the expected output.
